instruction:
Complete a professional pet portrait editing workflow on the image located at /home/user/Desktop/dog_with_background.png:

1. Remove the background using the 'Select by Color' tool (tolerance 25) to select the light blue water background, then invert the selection to keep only the dog, and delete the background to make it transparent.

2. Create a new layer named 'Gradient_BG' below the dog layer, fill it with a radial gradient from dark blue (#1a237e) at the center to purple (#4a148c) at the edges.

3. Adjust the dog layer's colors: increase saturation by 20%, increase contrast by 15%, and apply a slight warm color balance (+10 yellow).

4. Add a soft drop shadow to the dog layer: offset 8px, blur radius 15px, opacity 60%, color black.

5. Create a new layer named 'Vignette' at the top, fill with transparent black radial gradient (stronger at corners), and set layer opacity to 30%.

6. Add a text layer at the bottom center with 'HUSKY' in white, font size 48px, bold, with a subtle outer glow effect (white, 5px radius).

7. Export the final image as 'husky_portrait.png' with these specifications: PNG format with transparency, 1920px width (maintain aspect ratio), compression level 9. Also save the project as 'husky_project.xcf' preserving all layers.

command: import pyautogui; import time; pyautogui.hotkey('shift', 'ctrl', 'e'); time.sleep(1); pyautogui.write('husky_portrait'); time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.press('enter'); time.sleep(2); pyautogui.press('enter')

import pyautogui; import time; pyautogui.hotkey('shift', 'ctrl', 's'); time.sleep(1); pyautogui.write('husky_project.xcf'); time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.press('enter'); time.sleep(2); pyautogui.press('enter')
